rationale: Reviewed git diff 8b664359..196f07d2 -- internal/approve/*.go: three files touched (impl.go, impl_test.go, orphan_gate_test.go), and every changed line is inside a // comment block. No executable statement, function signature, struct field, interface, or implXxxFn seam definition changed. No import lines added/removed/reordered in any of the three files. The impl.go hunk only inserts a comment above the existing `if count == 0 && (planErr != nil || len(beadIDs) == 0)` line, which is byte-identical to round 1. The impl_test.go hunk rewrites the doc comment above TestApproveImpl_NoCommitsNoBeads; the test body/assertions are unchanged (confirmed by diff context — only lines above the func signature moved). The orphan_gate_test.go hunk only edits a comment inside a MockExecutor literal, correcting the impl.go:249 -> :294 citation; grep confirms exec.MergeBase("main", specBranch) is indeed at impl.go:294 in the current tree, and the comment now correctly labels :249 as the pre-115 Fact-1 pin rather than conflating it. go build ./... and go vet ./internal/approve both ran clean. My round-1 seam/import APPROVE stands undisturbed — nothing structural changed in round 2.
